mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activities ORDER BY activity_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activities (title, activity_time, location, description, image_url) VALUES (#{title}, #{activityTime}, #{location}, #{description}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET title = #{title}, activity_time = #{activityTime}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
